series_metadata.series_title: Manufactured Home Park Operator License Applications and Renewals
series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to the application, renewal, issuance, and denial of a manufactured home park operator license. This records series include, but is not limited to, the licenses, application and renewal forms, and associated correspondences.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed three years after submission. ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after submission., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
